mapper.insert: INSERT INTO img (img_kind, img_tag, img_idx, dir_a, dir_b, dir_c, dir_d, dir_e, img_name) VALUES ( #{img_kind, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img_tag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img_idx, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{dir_a, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dir_b, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dir_c, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dir_d, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dir_e, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{img_name, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE img SET img_name = #{after}, img_createddate = SYSDATE WHERE img_name = #{before}
